content: Visual Design Overhaul & Lab Suite Expansion. Refactored global layout to mirror modern shadcn aesthetics: rounded card boundaries, indigo/violet theme tokens, and default dark mode. Scaffolded 5 new laboratories including Open-Meteo weather trackers, active NHL Oilers schedules, FIFA World Cup scoreboards, Newtonian gravity orbit models, and an interactive SVG neural network impulse canvas.

Resolved variable typography rendering anomalies. Swapped the generic Fontsource implementation for Vercel's official 'geist' npm package. Configured custom relative @font-face paths in the stylesheet to circumvent package exports boundaries, enabling smooth variable weight axis scaling.

Fixed GitHub Actions deployment failures. Resolved a runner engine mismatch where the action defaults to Node 20 (unsupported by Astro v6). Upgraded withastro/action to v6 and explicitly declared 'node-version: 22' in deploy.yml. Production build is now fully active.

Project Bletchley scaffolding complete. Set up a static multi-page workspace using Astro v6, Tailwind CSS v4, and base relative path configurations (/project-bletchley) ready for deployment. Initial base framework pushed to main.
